creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Update applied.  There are several changes, because the port with your 
patches did not build and install here; one of the patches in the port 
did not apply cleanly, install failed for two different reasons 
(stripping a script, and bug in Makefile.in had a backwards ln). 

Note that if you make an error in a PR, you should followup on 
the same PR with corrections, instead of opening a new PR.  Also, 
version updates are not critical or high priority in most circumstances. 

Thank you for your submission.
